plugin.name: SugarCube
plugin.title: SugarCube
plugin.desc: A modified version of the SugarCube plugin with Floating Wobble support, Google traffic removed, artist weighting, and a new SugarCube Quick Settings page for on-the-fly Filter/Recipe/Genre/Artist/Mood mixing with automatic track replacement.
plugin.creator: Charles Parker, AF1, HB64
